title: Angling Aquarium Port
description: Makes water against glass not blue
body:
Ports the feature from [Angling](https://modrinth.com/mod/angling) by [EightSidedSquare](https://modrinth.com/user/EightSidedSquare) which makes water against glass not render blue as a client-side ~~mod~~ resourcepack, improving the visuals of fish tanks and underwater windows.

![A fish tank with clear non-blue water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fhiz52I7/images/7a8b21c49ebbf337d534d0f6359f501d7eed9d55.png)

Works well with a connected glass mod/resourcepack.

## Credits

Original idea by [EightSidedSquare](https://modrinth.com/user/EightSidedSquare).

This mod is not associated with Angling. **Please do not report any issues concerning AAP to Angling.**

<details>

<summary>[Outdated] Mod description</summary>

## Details

By default includes all blocks in `#c:glass_blocks`. Also supports partial glass blocks such as the glass doors and trapdoors from Create, if they are added to `#anglingaquariumport:sided_glass_blocks`.

## Compat

Compatible with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium). **Please report rendering issues to [AAP's issue tracker](https://github.com/ThePotatoArchivist/AnglingAquariumPort/issues), not to Sodium.**

  
</details>
